get-self-test-kit-for-HIV.title: Get a self-test kit for HIV
get-self-test-kit-for-HIV.ageRequirement: You can use this service if you are aged 18 or over.
get-self-test-kit-for-HIV.availabilityNotice: The kit is not yet available in all areas, so we'll need to check when you enter a postcode.

urgentCard.heading: Go to a sexual health clinic if:
urgentCard.exposureWarning: you think you've been exposed to the HIV virus in the last 72 hours
urgentCard.clinicAdvice: Clinic staff can offer you emergency HIV medicine, which may stop you getting infected.
urgentCard.aeAdvice: You can also get emergency HIV medicine from your

infoBox.text: HIV antibodies take time to develop. The test is accurate if you take it 45 days or more after potential exposure.

howItWorks.heading: How it works
howItWorks.deliveryInfo: The kit will be delivered in plain packaging, to the address you choose, within [n] working days. This does not have to be your usual address.
howItWorks.sampleInstructions: You'll need to prick your finger and fill a tube with blood. Then send it to the address in the pre-paid envelope.

dataSharing.summary: Who my information is shared with
dataSharing.details: Your contact details will only be shared with the kit supplier, who is a trusted NHS partner. Your contact details and test result will not be shared with anyone else, including your GP, unless you give consent.

aboutService.heading: About using this service
aboutService.text: By using this service, you agree to our

otherOptions.heading: Other options to home testing, and more support
otherOptions.clinicText: Instead of doing the test at home, you can go to
otherOptions.sexualHealthText: If you're concerned about other sexual health issues, you can

sexualHealthLink.text: find sexual health services near you

learnMoreLink.text: Learn more about HIV and AIDS

enter-delivery-address.title: Enter your delivery address and we'll check if the kit's available

enter-address-manually.title: Enter your delivery address manually and we'll check if the kit's available

no-address-found.title: No address found
no-address-found.notFoundMessage: We could not find an address that matches
